title: Stillness
desc: In the quiet moments, the mind finds its true home.

title: Clarity
desc: When the noise fades, vision becomes sharp and clear.

title: Presence
desc: The only moment that truly exists is right now.

title: strength
desc: The only moment that truly exists is right now.

title: AURA
desc: The only moment that truly exists is right now.

title: Change
desc: Change is not subtraction. It is recognition.

title: Identity
desc: What you call yourself is the smallest part of what you are

title: Moment
desc: Notice the moment before a thought arises. That gap is not absence. It is presence without form

title: Witness
desc: There is something within you that watches every thought without producing it. It does not argue. It does not approve. It simply sees.
